name: Coltea-Blend Herb Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the herbs in the vodka for two weeks.
2. Pour through a wire strainer, pressing out any remaining liquid.
3. Filter through cheesecloth several times.
4. Sweeten with sugar syrup or honey. If using honey, let it sit undisturbed for 2 weeks and then siphon the clear liquid.
Note: Coltea is an herb mixture blended for tea by Meadowbrook Herb Garden Company - containing sage, thyme, fennel, islandic moss, ground ivy, blackberry leaves, mullein, yarrow, cowslip, platain, anise, licorice, hyssop and linden flowers. Meadowbrook Herb Garden Co. is located in Wyoming, RI 02898.
